title: Lucky Hands
description: a mod centered around a variety of magical throwing cards
body:
Lucky Hands a mod developed by me with textures by Hstar747 is a simple mod focused on adding various different magical throwing cards.
Thanks to Jeremiah_No for making the Laura's Love and Harrow's Call texture on short notice (well not really anymore cuz his textures have been removed so uhhh L ig)

Cards:
- Basic Card:
  a simple throwing card that deals magical damage going through armour
- Pyro Card:
  a card that on hit or ground contact bursts into a fiery explosion
- Frost Card:
  a frost card freezing water and enemies (glacial refrence?)
- Purge Card:
  a card that temporarily disables opponents enchants
